welcome.title: Welcome to {{product}}
welcome.description: Let us show you around. A short guided tour covers your hierarchy, the pages available to you, and how to find and manage your assets. You can replay any tour later from the ? menu in the top bar.

highlights.see: See them on maps and floor plans

tour.title: Welcome tour
tour.toggle: Show the welcome tour when I sign in
tour.description: On until you finish the tour or choose to explore on your own. Turn it back on to be greeted again at your next sign-in, with your guide progress reset.

starter.title: Get oriented
starter.summary: Learn the layout, the pages, and every asset filter.

concept.title: How your space is organized
concept.description: Everything lives in one tree, right here in the sidebar. Each level is called an owner. Click one and the whole app, including the pages in the top bar, focuses on that owner:
concept.client: A company or tenant. The top level; everything else lives inside it.
concept.building: A physical site that belongs to a client: a warehouse, plant, or office.
concept.floor: A level inside a building. A floor can carry a floor map that shows items at their real position.
concept.zone: A named area on a floor, like 'Receiving'. The most precise place an asset can live.

topbar.title: The top bar
topbar.description: Shows where you are and the pages available there. What you see on every page follows your selection in the sidebar.
topbar.description_named: Shows where you are and the pages available there. Right now you're in {{ownerLevel}} {{ownerName}}: the assets, devices, and people you see belong to it.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Your at-a-glance overview: asset counts by status and type, device activity, and user activity for whatever you've selected in the sidebar.

assets.title: Assets
assets.description: The things you track. Search, filter, and locate them on the map or floor plan. Most day-to-day work happens here.

devices.title: Devices
devices.description: The hardware that reports data: trackers and repeaters. Devices are attached to assets so their data counts toward the right item.

users.title: Users
users.description: The people with access. Invite users, assign roles, and control what each person can see and do at every level.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Configuration for whatever you've selected in the sidebar: branding, asset rules, preferences, and security.

openAssets.title: Open Assets
openAssets.description: Click the Assets tab to see them. We'll wait here until you do.
openAssets.description_named: Click the Assets tab to see the assets in {{ownerLevel}} {{ownerName}}. We'll wait here until you do.

search.title: Find anything
search.description: Search by name or any detail to find an asset fast.
search.description_named: Search by name or any detail to quickly find an asset in {{ownerLevel}} {{ownerName}}.

open.title: Open the filters
open.description: Click Filters to open the filter panel. It narrows the asset list and map to exactly what you need.

status.title: Status
status.description: Every asset carries one of these statuses:

statusMeanings.AWAITING_TELEMETRY: Paired with a tracker, but nothing received yet.

type.title: Asset type
type.description: Show only one category of asset, like every forklift. Types come from the templates your team creates.

accuracy.title: Accuracy
accuracy.description: Location readings vary in precision. Low-accuracy readings are hidden from floor plans by default; turn this on to include them.

device.title: Device attachment
device.description: Filter by whether an asset has a tracker attached. Assets without a device cannot report their position.

table.title: The asset list
table.description: Every asset in view is listed here. Click one to open it. If there are none yet, a Next button will appear shortly so you can skip ahead.
table.description_named: Every asset in {{ownerLevel}} {{ownerName}} is listed here. Click one to open it. If there are none yet, a Next button will appear shortly so you can skip ahead.

details.title: Asset details
details.description: Everything about this asset: its current status and location, its properties, and any attached devices. Edit or manage it from here.

locate.title: See it on the map
locate.description: The selected asset is highlighted here, on the map or floor plan, at its last known position.

history.title: Where it has been
history.description: The History tab lists this asset's past locations. Click a row to replay that moment on the map.

done.title: You're all set
done.description: That's the essentials. Replay this tour, or take the hands-on guides, any time from the ? menu in the top bar.

openAssets.title: Open Assets
openAssets.description: The add menu lives on the Assets page. Click the Assets tab to start.

context.title: Pick where to add it
context.description: Select the global level or a client in the sidebar. Clients are created from there.

open.title: Add a client
open.description: Your space is a tree: Client → Building → Floor → Zone. Open this menu and choose 'Add Client'.

name.title: Name it
name.description: Your company or tenant name. Required.

industry.title: Industry
industry.description: Optional. Just a label you can change later.

save.title: Save
save.description: Click Create to save your client.

done.title: Client created
done.description: Your client is ready. Select it in the sidebar, then add a building inside it.

sidebar.title: It's in the sidebar
sidebar.description: Your client now appears here. Select it, and everything you add next goes inside it.

building.title: Add a building
building.summary: Add a building under a client.

context.title: Select a client
context.description: Choose a client in the sidebar first. Buildings are created inside a client.

open.title: Add a building
open.description: With the client selected, open this menu and choose 'Add Building'.

done.title: Building created
done.description: Your building is saved. Select it to add floors inside it.

sidebar.title: The tree grows
sidebar.description: The building now sits under your client. The hierarchy fills in as you go.

topbar.title: Everything follows your selection
topbar.description: This bar shows your location. Whatever you select in the sidebar decides the assets, devices, and access you see.

floor.title: Add a floor
floor.summary: Add a floor to a building.

context.title: Select a building
context.description: Choose a building in the sidebar first. Floors are created inside a building.

open.title: Add a floor
open.description: Select the building, open this menu, and choose 'Add Floor'.

done.title: Floor created
done.description: Your floor is saved. Select it to add zones inside it.

zone.title: Add a zone
zone.summary: Add a zone to a floor.

context.title: Select a floor
context.description: Choose a floor in the sidebar first. Zones are created inside a floor.

open.title: Add a zone
open.description: Select the floor, open this menu, and choose 'Add Zone'. Zones are the smallest level.

name.title: Name it
name.description: Your zone's name, then complete the form.

done.title: Done!
done.description: You've built a full Client → Building → Floor → Zone hierarchy.

assetType.title: Create an asset type
assetType.summary: Make a reusable template for your assets.

selectOwner.title: Pick a company
selectOwner.description: Asset types belong to a company. Select a company, or anything inside it, in the sidebar first.

openAssets.title: Open Assets
openAssets.description: Asset types are managed on the Assets page. Click the Assets tab.

openManager.title: Asset types
openManager.description: A type is a template for similar items, like 'Forklift'. Open the Asset Types manager here.

createType.title: Create a type
createType.description: Click 'Create Type' to start a new one.

color.title: Color
color.description: A visual tag to spot this type. Optional.

properties.title: Properties
properties.description: Fields every asset of this type must have, like Serial Number. They become required when creating assets.

filter.title: Types are also filters
filter.description: Your new type doubles as a filter. On the Assets page, open Filters and use Asset type to see only assets of one kind.

createAsset.title: Add an asset
createAsset.summary: Create one real item you track.

scoping.title: Assets have a home
scoping.description: An asset lives wherever you've selected in the sidebar: a client, building, floor, or zone. Pick the right place before you create it.

selectOwner.title: Pick where it lives
selectOwner.description: Select the client, building, floor, or zone this asset belongs to in the sidebar.

openAssets.title: Open Assets
openAssets.description: Click the Assets tab for the place you picked.
openAssets.description_named: Click the Assets tab. Your new asset will be created in {{ownerLevel}} {{ownerName}}.

create.title: Add an asset
create.description: An asset is one real thing you track. Click here to open the form.

name.title: Name it
name.description: This item's name or ID, like 'Forklift #3'. Required.

type.title: Its type
type.description: Pick a type. If it has required fields they'll appear below, and Next stays locked until they're filled.

mandatory.title: Required fields
mandatory.description: Fields marked * are required by the type. Fill them all in; the Next button unlocks once they're complete.

finish.title: Finish
finish.description: Click Next, optionally add a device and location, then Create.

device.title: Add a device
device.summary: Create a tracker and attach it to an asset.

concept.title: What is a device?
concept.description: A device is the hardware that reports data: a tracker that sends location and status, or a repeater that extends coverage. Devices power everything you see about an asset.

selectOwner.title: Pick where it lives
selectOwner.description: Devices have a home, just like assets. Select the right client, building, floor, or zone in the sidebar.

openDevices.title: Open Devices
openDevices.description: Devices are managed on the Devices page. Click the Devices tab.
openDevices.description_named: Devices are managed on the Devices page. Click the Devices tab; your device will belong to {{ownerLevel}} {{ownerName}}.

create.title: Add a device
create.description: Click here to open the device form.

name.title: Name it
name.description: A recognizable name for this device. Required.

typeLegend.repeater: Relays signals from other devices to extend coverage.

save.title: Save
save.description: Click Create to register the device.

attach.title: Attach it to an asset
attach.description: A device on its own only reports raw data. Attach it to an asset and everything it sends is associated with that asset. Open an asset and add the device from its details.

context.title: Select a client
context.description: Settings are configured per client. Select a client, the company level, in the sidebar first.

open.title: Open Settings
open.description: Click the Settings tab. We'll wait here until you do.

assets.title: Settings: Assets
assets.summary: Asset templates, inactivity rules, and accuracy.

tab.title: The Assets tab
tab.description: Everything about how assets behave for this client. Click the Assets tab.

config.title: Asset configuration
config.description: Property definitions are the reusable fields your asset types can require. Asset types are the templates themselves. Both are managed from here.

inactivity.title: Inactivity rules
inactivity.description: Decide when a silent asset should be marked in transit, and later missing, based on how long it has gone without an update.

accuracy.title: Accuracy threshold
accuracy.description: Set the accuracy, in meters, a location reading needs to appear on floor plans. Weaker readings are hidden unless a user opts in.

branding.title: Settings: Branding
branding.summary: White label the platform for this client.

tab.title: The Branding tab
tab.description: Make the platform look like this client's own product. Click the Branding tab.

whitelabel.title: White labeling
whitelabel.description: Set the platform name, logo, favicon, and every color of the interface. Changes preview live before you save.

done.title: Their brand, everywhere
done.description: Once saved, everyone under this client sees the platform in these colors, with this name and logo, even on the login page for their domain.

preferences.title: Settings: Preferences
preferences.summary: Default behaviors for everyone under this client.

tab.title: The Preferences tab
tab.description: Defaults that apply to everyone under this client. Click the Preferences tab.

autoExpand.title: Navigation behavior
autoExpand.description: Choose whether the sidebar tree starts fully expanded for users, or collapsed so they drill down themselves.

security.title: Settings: Security
security.summary: Session timeout rules for this client.

tab.title: The Security tab
tab.description: Access and session rules. Click the Security tab.

timeout.title: Session timeout
timeout.description: How long a user can stay inactive before being signed out automatically. Shorter timeouts are safer on shared computers.
